subject: Re: Dershowitz Book Blurb
body:
just to make sure that the blurb is from wes and not
his asst

--- Cecilia Steen <cecilia.steen@gmail.com> wrote:

> "Dershowitz has once again taken on one of the
> thorniest legal and
> political issues of our time – how government must
> act to protect our
> citizens in the face of new threats while also
> acting within the
> bounds of international law.  Sparkling with
> insights and examples
> this is a path breaking, must read for government
> leaders, strategists
> and all concerned Americans."
> 
> --
> Jessie Walker
> Executive Assistant
> Wesley K. Clark & Associates
>

--- Cecilia Steen cecilia.steen@gmail.com wrote:

"Dershowitz has once again taken on one of the
thorniest legal and
political issues of our time – how government must
act to protect our
citizens in the face of new threats while also
acting within the
bounds of international law. Sparkling with
insights and examples
this is a path breaking, must read for government
leaders, strategists
and all concerned Americans."

--
Jessie Walker
Executive Assistant
Wesley K. Clark & Associates
